original_image_tags: A vertical, lined paper form with handwritten text in blue/black ink. Top left corner has printed text: "422a (Rev. 8-23-57)". A black ink blot obscures text at the top right.

elements.description: A pre-printed 'SEARCH SLIP' form with handwritten entries in ink. The form includes fields for 'Subj:' (handwritten 'Albert K. Bender'), 'Supervisor' (handwritten 'Wacks'), 'Room' (handwritten '1515'), 'Date' (handwritten '12-10'), 'Searcher' (handwritten 'Jones'), and a table for 'FILE NUMBER' and 'SERIAL'. The table contains one entry: under FILE NUMBER, 'albert', 'NI ✓ 100-103204', 'A.K.', 'NR'; under SERIAL, '18'. The form is a scanned document of a physical paper slip.

judge.reason: The descriptions are contradictory on specific quoted text: Description A quotes a printed code '422a (Rev. 8-23-57)' and an ink blot, while Description B quotes a different set of fields and handwritten entries (e.g., 'Albert K. Bender', 'Wacks', '1515'), and neither mentions the other's quoted text, indicating they describe different visual content.
